sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2024-02-15 18:13
- Distance: 3.7 km
- Moving time: 25:31
- Elapsed time: 27:39
- Elevation gain: 84.6 m
- Average heart rate: 162.1 bpm
- Max heart rate: 188 bpm
- Average speed: 8.7 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `160.9 bpm`, ranging from `158.3` to `163.4 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `128.2 spm`, with a working range of `125.3` to `130.6 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `126.3 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `130.1 spm` (+3.8 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:52 /km` across `3.717 km` in `25:31` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:49 /km` and second-half pace was `6:54 /km` (+5 s/km), so pace stayed broadly even.

- Strava summary HR came in at `162.1 bpm` average and `188 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `159.3 bpm` in the first half and `164.0 bpm` in the second (+4.8 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `25:31` out of `27:39` elapsed (92.3%), which shows some stop-start interruption.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `80` stop segments and `21.1%` stationary samples, so the route included repeated interruptions.

- Strava logged about `94.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `48.0 m` and `90.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `53.6 m` in the first half and `41.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
